focus: Current Refero contract drift, UI-reference workflows, commercial gating, mcp-remote boundaries, and read-only Code Mode/sk-design pairing

label: Use the detailed official tools page/current raw skill as the eight-tool contract; search-index four-tool output is stale or inconsistent
